features.card3Desc: Ask anything about your chart in an ongoing AI conversation grounded in your specific Bazi.
features.alsoNote: Also: daily personalized fortune readings with classical poetry.

what.title: What is Bazi
what.p1: Bazi, also known as the "Four Pillars," maps your moment of birth onto coordinates of the Year, Month, Day, and Hour pillars.
what.p2: It records the configuration of Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches at the moment you entered the world — a record of celestial and terrestrial energy.
what.p3: For thousands of years, Chinese readers have used Bazi to understand their personality tendencies, life rhythms, and major decisions. It is not fortune-telling; it is a framework for self-knowledge based on time and energy.
what.bridge: Bazi Master combines this tradition with AI, turning thousand-year-old practice into insights you can read and use.

process.title: How your chart is computed
process.step2Desc: True solar time at your location
process.step3Desc: Four pillars, Ten Gods, hidden stems
process.footnote: Not a template generator. We use classical 《渊海子平》 ranking logic, real true-solar-time correction based on your birth coordinates, and AI reading grounded in the structured chart — never abstract guesswork.

footer.disclaimer: Bazi Master is for personal reference only. It does not constitute medical, legal, or financial advice.
